keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY CRAVINGS AND DESIRES. Cravings and desires, beer : Stro., Sul. Cravings and desires, bitters : Dig., Nat-m. Cravings and desires, cabbage : Cic. Cravings and desires, coffee : Bry., Nux-v. Cravings and desires, fats , etc. : Calc-p., Nit-ac., Nux-v. Cravings and desires, hot things : Ars., Bry., Chel., Fer., Lac-c. Cravings and desires, juicy foods , fruit : Pho-ac., Stap., Ver-a. Cravings and desires, liquids : Stap., Sul. Cravings and desires, milk : Rhus-t., Saba. Cravings and desires, pregnancy , during : Sep. Cravings and desires, refreshing things : Pul. Cravings and desires, salty things : Carb-v., Caust., Nat-m., Pho., Ver-a. Cravings and desires, sour things : Aco., Arn., Ars., Bell., Cham., Hep., Pul., Sul., Ver-a. Cravings and desires, spirits , alcoholic : Arn., Ars., Calc-c., Lach., Nux-v., Op., Stap., Sul., Syph. Cravings and desires, things that are refused, when offered : Bry., Cham., Pho., Stap. Cravings and desires, sweets and dainties : Arg-n., Chin., Kali-c., Lyc., Saba., Sul. Cravings and desires, wine : Calc-c. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
